evals.prompt: List all my automations — hooks, skills, plugins, agents, MCP servers. Show me everything I have installed across global and project scope.
evals.expected_output: A .CLAUDE.inventory.md file with Global Scope (hooks, skills, plugins, plugin-bundled content, blocked plugins, settings), Project Scope (hooks, MCP servers, skills, agents), MCP Auth State section (if ~/.claude/mcp-needs-auth-cache.json exists), Keybindings section (if ~/.claude/keybindings.json exists), and CLAUDE.md Quality section (if CLAUDE.md exists in project root, with 8-criteria scoring table), plus .CLAUDE.inventory.json (with mcpAuthState, keybindings, and claudeMdQuality keys) and .CLAUDE.inventory.hash files. All items tagged as installed or custom.

evals.prompt: What Claude Code skills and plugins do I have? Generate an inventory of my setup.
evals.expected_output: A .CLAUDE.inventory.md file showing Global Scope with all plugins and skills, but Project Scope should show 'No project-level automations configured' or minimal content since this project has no .claude/ directory with skills/agents.

evals.prompt: I just installed some new plugins, update my automation inventory so it reflects the latest changes.
evals.expected_output: A regenerated .CLAUDE.inventory.md with a Recent Changes section showing additions/removals detected by comparing against the previous .CLAUDE.inventory.json. Updated .hash file.

evals.prompt: Show me my memory files, scheduled tasks, and plugin health status.
evals.expected_output: A .CLAUDE.inventory.md file containing: Memory Files section with file/type/description table and summary counts, Scheduled Tasks section (or omitted if no tasks), Plugin Health section with orphaned versions and potential issues sub-tables. JSON sidecar includes memory, scheduledTasks, and pluginHealth keys with schemaVersion: 2.

evals.prompt: Generate an inventory and show me the execution order of all my hooks and the full CLAUDE.md hierarchy.
evals.expected_output: A .CLAUDE.inventory.md where the Global Hooks table has a # column showing sequence numbers (global settings hooks first, then plugin-bundled hooks, then project hooks). CLAUDE.md Quality section includes a Hierarchy sub-table listing all CLAUDE.md files from ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md through subdirectories with line counts and scope labels, followed by the quality score for the project root CLAUDE.md.

evals.prompt: Generate a global-only inventory of my Claude Code setup. I want to see just my global plugins, skills, hooks, and settings — no project-specific stuff.
evals.expected_output: A ~/.claude/.CLAUDE.inventory.md file containing only Global Scope sections: hooks, skills, plugins, plugin-bundled content, blocked plugins, settings, plugin health. No Project Scope, Local Scope, Memory Files, or Recommendations sections. Header shows 'Regenerate: /inventory-global'. JSON sidecar at ~/.claude/.CLAUDE.inventory.json with schemaVersion: 3.

evals.prompt: Compare the automations across all my projects. Show me what each project has and flag any inconsistencies.
evals.expected_output: A ~/.claude/.CLAUDE.cross-project.md file with a Summary table showing counts (hooks, MCP servers, skills, agents, memory files, CLAUDE.md status) per project, plus an Inconsistencies table flagging projects missing CLAUDE.md or hooks. Worktree slugs filtered out. JSON sidecar at ~/.claude/.CLAUDE.cross-project.json.

evals.prompt: Generate an inventory showing my deferred MCP tools, any background monitoring in my skills, and my sandbox security settings.
evals.expected_output: A .CLAUDE.inventory.md where MCP Servers table has a Loading column (eager/deferred), followed by a Deferred Tools sub-table listing lazy-loaded tools. Background Monitoring sub-section lists any skills/hooks using Monitor tool or run_in_background. Security section under Global Scope shows sandbox mode, dangerouslySkipPermissions, and permission count. JSON sidecar includes deferredTools, monitoring, and security keys with schemaVersion: 4.
